leads.Description: Looking for office space for our team of 20 in the City of London area. We're a recruitment firm that's been growing steadily. Ideally somewhere modern with good transport links. Budget is flexible but we want value for money.

Hi, we spoke briefly at the networking event last month. We're a 45-person tech company currently in Shoreditch but our lease is up in 3 weeks and we need to move fast. Looking at Canary Wharf or the City. Need good internet infrastructure and ideally 24/7 access. We just closed our Series B so budget isn't the primary concern.
leads.Custom_Notes__c: Met at TechConnect event. Seemed serious.

leads.Description: We're a small sustainability consultancy, just 4 people. Looking for something affordable and green-certified if possible. Anywhere in London is fine, we're flexible on location. Part-time access would work for us actually, we don't need a full-time office.
leads.Custom_Notes__c: Referred by existing client Apex Partners.

leads.Description: URGENT: We require immediate pricing for 500 desks across multiple London locations. Please send your full rate card and available inventory list to this email address as soon as possible. We represent several Fortune 500 companies looking to establish London presence. Time sensitive opportunity.

We're a law firm with 30 people looking for prestigious offices in Mayfair or St James's. Confidentiality and security are paramount. We need private meeting rooms that are soundproofed. Currently paying about 85 per desk per month but open to spending more for the right space.
leads.Custom_Notes__c: Spoke with agent Tom. Very particular about privacy requirements. Mentioned they handle high-profile litigation.

leads.Description: Hi there, our parent company is looking for a London office for our UK subsidiary. We need space for about 15-20 people in the City of London. We're in financial services so something professional is important. Happy to discuss requirements in more detail.

Hey! We're a creative agency (12 people) and we need somewhere that feels inspiring. Open plan, lots of natural light, maybe some breakout areas. Somewhere in Soho or Fitzrovia would be amazing. Oh and we've got 2 dogs that come to work with us so pet-friendly is essential!

Looking for a very high-end office for our hedge fund. 8 people but we need the space to look like 50. Mayfair only. Budget is not an issue whatsoever. We need a prestigious address for our letterhead. Currently on Berkeley Square but the landlord has been useless.
leads.Custom_Notes__c: Agent Sarah took this call. He was quite demanding but sounds like a serious high-value client. Mentioned their current rent is over 1200 per desk per month.

leads.Description: Need a small office for 6 people. Nothing fancy, just functional. Somewhere with parking ideally. We're a logistics company so we don't need central London. Happy with anywhere that's got good motorway access. Budget conscious, looking to spend as little as possible.

We're a growing digital marketing agency, about 40 people. Looking for modern office space in the City or Canary Wharf area. Need strong wifi and good meeting room facilities. Our current lease ends in about 6 months so no massive rush but want to start looking.

We're looking to downsize from our current traditional office. We have 25 staff but realistically only 15 are in on any given day. Would a flexible arrangement work where we only pay for 15 desks but can surge to 25 when needed? Located in the City currently and would prefer to stay.
leads.Custom_Notes__c: Referred by David Wheeler at Long Story Short agency. Good relationship there.

leads.Description: Hi, we're a startup with 3 co-founders. We've been working from home but just got accepted into an accelerator programme that requires us to have a London presence. Budget is very tight, probably 300 per month max for the three of us. Is that realistic? We mainly need a registered address and somewhere to meet clients occasionally. By the way, we also spoke to your competitor EasyOffices last week and they quoted us something interesting so keen to compare.

We spoke 6 months ago but the timing wasn't right. We're now ready to move. Same requirements: 35 people, City or Canary Wharf, need Bloomberg terminals supported. We went with a competitor last time but their service has been terrible. Hoping you can do better. We want to be in by end of April.
leads.Custom_Notes__c: Previous enquiry from September 2025, was handled by agent Mark who has since left the company. Original notes not carried over to new CRM.

leads.Description: We're a registered charity looking for affordable office space for our 10-person team. We receive government funding so need to demonstrate value for money in all our procurement. Are there any operators who offer charity rates? We're currently in Southwark but our building is being redeveloped so we need to move within 8 weeks.

Hi, this is James Whitfield. I'm also looking for space for my investment vehicle, separate from my tech company. Need a small 4-person private office, very discreet, Mayfair preferred. This would be a different contract to any other enquiry I might have with you.
leads.Custom_Notes__c: Same phone number as L002. Agent didn't flag this.

accounts.Name: Apex Partners
accounts.Description: Existing client since 2024. 3 successful placements. Very happy.

accounts.Name: Zenith Financial Partners
accounts.Description: Enquired September 2025. Went with competitor. Lost deal.

accounts.Name: Nexus Digital Solutions
accounts.Description: Met at TechConnect networking event. James Whitfield is CEO.

opportunities.Name: Zenith Financial Partners - Office Search
opportunities.Description: 35-person office in City/Canary Wharf. Bloomberg required. Lost to competitor.

opportunities.Name: Nexus Digital Solutions - Relocation
opportunities.Description: 45-person tech company moving from Shoreditch. Lease expiring soon.
